headline: QUALIFY SUPPLIERS THE RIGHT WAY
subheading: A risk-based, audit-ready path from classification to approval under EU GMP and ICH Q9.
flux_prompt: Abstract editorial illustration of a pharmaceutical supplier qualification framework, conveyed through a layered network of interconnected nodes and verification checkpoints flowing across four ascending tiers. Glowing teal and cyan connecting lines link clusters of pristine glass vials, a stylised supply-chain pathway, and concentric audit-checkmark badges set against a deep navy background. Floating translucent dossier and certificate panels with subtle data-grid textures suggest documentation review and approval, while a faint magnifying-glass lens motif evokes inspection and risk assessment. A delicate fresh-green accent traces the final approved pathway and a single ascending arrow, signalling trust and continuous monitoring. Polished clinical-luxury aesthetic, smooth gradients, soft volumetric glow, geometric precision, shallow depth of field, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
